---
name: demo-check
description: >
  Presentation-readiness audit. Walks the story beats in
  docs/demo-narrative.md and reports blockers, visual issues,
  and polish items. Use when nearing completion.
---

# Demo Check

When invoked:

1. Read `docs/demo-narrative.md`. If empty, ask the developer to fill it in.
2. Walk each story beat: route exists, no placeholder text, navigation works, hero interaction functions.
3. Group findings: Blockers, then Visual issues, then Polish.
4. If clean, say so and stop.
